basic_details.job_title: CBHFL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Cent Bank Home Finance Limited (CBHFL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Chief Financial Officer. Candidates with CA Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through CBHFL official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Chartered Accountant from recognized Institution. Basic Knowledge of computer applications including knowledge of Advance Excel.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.cbhfl.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
